SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-21-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF TAMIKA C. LUMSEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FELICIA LOANE IS PRESENT. PARTIES VERBALLY STIPULATED TO HAVE THE CASE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUMSEY, TAMIKA C RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOANE, FELICIA $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, DEFENDANT HAD NOTICE OF FATSO'S AGGRESSIVE, DANGEROUS & VICIOUS TENDENCIES AS ESTABLISHED BY FINDINGS OF ANIMAL CARE & CONTROL, INCLUDING PRIOR INCIDENTS. DEFENDANT ALSO DID NOT PROPERLY SUPERVISE FATSO & DEFENDANT'S OTHER DOG NALA. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
